content.thinking:
I need to count the number of times the letter "r" appears in the word "strawberry".

Let me go through each letter in "strawberry":
s - t - r - a - w - b - e - r - r - y

1. s - not an r
2. t - not an r
3. r - this is an r (1st r)
4. a - not an r
5. w - not an r
6. b - not an r
7. e - not an r
8. r - this is an r (2nd r)
9. r - this is an r (3rd r)
10. y - not an r

So there are 3 r's in the word "strawberry".

content.text:
To count the letter "r" in the word "strawberry", I'll go through each letter:

The letter "r" appears **3 times** in the word "strawberry":

- One "r" in position 8
- One "r" in position 9
